records.ety: [F. luminaire, L. luminare a light or lamp, which was lighted in the churches, a luminary, fr. lumen, luminis, light, fr. lucere to be light, to shine, lux, lucis, light. See Light.]

defs: Any body that gives light, especially one of the heavenly bodies.
quotes: Where the great luminary . . . Dispenses light from far.

defs: One who illustrates any subject, or enlightens mankind; as, Newton was a distinguished luminary.
